Home / Service Areas / Media

Masonry in Media, PA

Trusted local professionals serving Media and surrounding communities

Serving Media, PA

Onyx Masonry enhances Media's charming streetscapes with our expert brick and stone work. Known as 'Everybody's Hometown,' Media features a blend of historic and contemporary architecture where quality masonry makes a significant impact. We specialize in creating inviting storefronts, durable sidewalks, and beautiful residential features that contribute to Media's small-town appeal. Our work in Media often involves collaborating with local businesses to create distinctive facades that attract customers while maintaining the borough's character. For homeowners, we design outdoor living spaces that take advantage of Media's pleasant climate and community-oriented atmosphere.

Media's walkable downtown benefits from attractive, durable masonry features.

Masonry Services in Media

Historic Brick Repointing

Breathing new life into Philadelphia's aging brickwork with period-accurate techniques.

Learn more →

Stoop Restoration

Rebuilding Philadelphia's iconic entry steps to withstand decades more use.

Learn more →

Chimney Restoration

Securing Philadelphia's chimney stacks against harsh winters and high winds.

Learn more →

Stone Foundation Stabilization

Arresting settlement in Philadelphia's vintage stone basements.

Learn more →

Garden Wall Construction

Building private outdoor spaces worthy of Philadelphia's hidden gardens.

Learn more →

Need Masonry in Media?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Media and the surrounding area.
